Table	Create Table
invoices	CREATE TABLE `invoices` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `organization_id` int(11) DEFAULT '1',
  `userId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `budgetLineId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `sessionId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `invoiceNumber` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `fileUrl` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `budgetLineCategory` enum('coordinator_fee','facilitator_fee','venue_hire','monitoring_evaluation','contingency','management_fee') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','pending','approved','rejected','paid') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'draft',
  `submittedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `approvedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `approvedBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `paidAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `rejectionReason` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `aiCategorized` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `totalAmount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `paidAmount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dueDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `admin_comments` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_number` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_code` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `auto_generated` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `adminComments` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `rejectedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `rejectedBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `idx_organization` (`organization_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
